safety_tips.tip: Acclimatization: when you are heading to Cusco or the Sacred Valley (high altitudes), take it easy for the first 24-48 hours. Avoid strenuous activity, heavy meals, and alcohol
Coca Tea/Leaves: Many hotels offer coca tea (mate de coca), which can help alleviate altitude symptoms. Chewing coca leaves is also a traditional method

source_files: South America/Craig_ All Inclusive Guide - Peru.pdf
South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru- Neha and Mayur.pdf
South America/All Inclusive Guide - Peru_CRE.pdf
